text:
(Making of ) evangelion: Another Impact is anime short number 20B from the '. it is a collaboration between the studio khara inc. and the media company Dwango. It is a making-of anime based on Evangelion: Another Impact (Confidential). It was directed by Masaru Matsumoto. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Japan_Animator_Expo The soundtrack is "God's Gift =3EM31=" by Shirō Sagisu.

Profile

The making-of anime shows elements of these aspects:
FX & Dynamics Breakdown 
Pre Production of the EVA Head
Pre production of EVA Head Exploded view
EVA design (Front and Rear)
3D Modeling
Marking designs
Guntry design
Cage design
3D Modeling cage
Motion capture video continuity
Layout
Animation
Composition Breakdown
